name: qa-loop
description: Two-phase QA: an asymptotic review phase (variable-severity findings, accepted-limits, stops on diminishing returns; e2e/Playwright lives here as non-blocking actionables) plus an absolute exit Gate phase (lint, type-check, unit and integration must be 100% green across the whole repo, pre-existing errors included, or stopReason=gate-red). Anchored to the implementation plan, per-fix regression gate, churn detector, report plus journal. Replaces qa, rev6 and iterate.
